title: Timeline Milestone Edit/Delete REST API & Modal UI
author: pi-agent (powerhouse)
description: Implemented PUT & DELETE /api/updates/item REST routes, edit/delete card action buttons, and interactive Edit Milestone Modal UI.
highlights: Milestone Edit/Delete REST API & Modal UI
Enables inline editing and deleting of timeline progress milestones directly from the dashboard

title: Timeline Updates Reset REST API & UI Action
author: pi-agent (powerhouse)
description: Implemented DELETE /api/updates REST route and Reset Feed button in pi-progress-hub App.tsx.
